_comment: Provider-specific LLM defaults.  Augar generate --config can override.

chatgpt_oauth._note: Authenticates via local Codex CLI OAuth — no API key needed.

deepseek._note: Set reasoning_effort=low|medium|high|xhigh to enable thinking mode. Requires DEEPSEEK_API_KEY env var.

openai_compatible._note: Generic OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Set --model as needed.

local._note: Local LLM server (ollama, vllm, llama.cpp, etc). Set --model to match your local model name.
